abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} (formidable or greater) with the xenoarcheologist to recover alien knowledge or relics, you reroll any dice. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0d7f13818c1c19ed]{Reach a Milestone} in that quest, take +2 momentum. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} and score a hit, mark 1 tick on your discoveries legacy track. When they make a move to traverse, scavenge, or make camp in an alien site, add +1.

When the xenoarcheologist makes a move to research or study something precursor-related, you may reroll one challenge die. On a match, they piece together a revelation; envision it and mark 1 tick on your discoveries legacy track. When they make a move using their precursor knowledge, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
When the xenoarcheologist makes a move to assault, avoid, or outwit precursor technology, you may reroll any dice and take +3 momentum on a hit.
